title: Instant NFC Business Cards for Sales Teams
summary:
Revenue: $15/card (wholesale $5), $250 min order; upsell "landing page design" for $50.
- **Time to first $**: 2 days (Fiverr listing).
- **First action**: Draft Fiverr gig titled "Instant NFC Business Cards - 24h Delivery" with sample landing page video.
- **Risk**: Sales teams hesitant to adopt new tech (mitigated by $0.99 trial card).
Next step: Draft Fiverr gig titled "Instant NFC Business Cards - 24h Delivery" with sample landing page video.
